---
layout: page
title: "About me"
---

<style>
  .phd-home {
    --panel-top: #f1f1f1;
    --panel-bottom: #d1d1d1;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 1040px;
    margin: 1.5rem auto 3rem;
    color: #111;
    font-family: Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif;
  }

  .phd-home * {
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  .phd-about {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 270px;
    margin: 4.5rem 1.5rem 0;
    padding: 3.3rem 1rem 2.4rem;
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    justify-content: center;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--panel-top), var(--panel-bottom));
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .phd-about p {
    max-width: 960px;
    margin: 0;
    text-align: center;
    font-size: clamp(1.05rem, 2vw, 1.45rem);
    line-height: 1.28;
  }

  .phd-news {
    position: relative;
    width: min(820px, 82%);
    min-height: 165px;
    margin: 10.5rem auto 0;
    padding: 1.5rem 4.5rem 1.8rem;
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f4f4f4, #d8d8d8);
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .phd-news h2 {
    margin: 0 0 1.3rem;
    text-align: center;
    font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.5vw, 2rem);
    line-height: 1.2;
  }

  .phd-news ul {
    width: fit-content;
    max-width: 100%;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding-left: 1.4rem;
    list-style-type: square;
    font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.8vw, 1.25rem);
    line-height: 1.45;
  }

  .phd-news a {
    color: inherit;
    text-decoration: underline;
    text-underline-offset: 0.15em;
  }

  .phd-news a:hover {
    color: #56318e;
  }

  .phd-decor {
    position: absolute;
    z-index: 2;
    display: block;
    max-width: none;
    border: 0;
    background: transparent;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .phd-knit {
    width: 115px;
    top: -76px;
    left: -43px;
  }

  .phd-books {
    width: 105px;
    top: -73px;
    right: -12px;
  }

  .phd-laptop {
    width: 150px;
    left: -70px;
    bottom: -52px;
  }

  .phd-flower {
    width: 130px;
    right: -38px;
    bottom: -32px;
  }

  .phd-pot {
    width: 120px;
    right: 35px;
    top: -78px;
  }

  @media (max-width: 760px) {
    .phd-home {
      margin-top: 1rem;
    }

    .phd-about {
      min-height: 330px;
      margin: 4rem 0.8rem 0;
      padding: 3.2rem 1.1rem 3.2rem;
    }

    .phd-about p {
      font-size: 1rem;
      line-height: 1.42;
    }

    .phd-knit {
      width: 82px;
      left: -10px;
      top: -55px;
    }

    .phd-books {
      width: 76px;
      right: -3px;
      top: -52px;
    }

    .phd-laptop {
      width: 112px;
      left: -20px;
      bottom: -42px;
    }

    .phd-flower {
      width: 96px;
      right: -13px;
      bottom: -27px;
    }

    .phd-news {
      width: 92%;
      min-height: 180px;
      margin-top: 8rem;
      padding: 1.7rem 2.1rem 1.6rem;
      border-radius: 70px;
    }

    .phd-news ul {
      width: auto;
      font-size: 0.98rem;
    }

    .phd-pot {
      width: 88px;
      right: 18px;
      top: -57px;
    }
  }
</style>

<div class="phd-home">

  <section class="phd-about">
    <img class="phd-decor phd-knit" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
    <img class="phd-decor phd-books" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
    <img class="phd-decor phd-laptop" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
    <img class="phd-decor phd-flower" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">

    <p>
      I hold a Master’s degree in Natural Language Processing from Université de Lorraine (IDMC)
      and I have recently started my PhD at Orange, focusing on formal semantics approaches to
      enhance conversational understanding in machines. My research interests lie at the
      intersection of computational linguistics, artificial intelligence, and language models,
      with a particular emphasis on meaning representation, formal semantics, and frugal methods
      in NLP.
    </p>
  </section>

  <section class="phd-news">
    <img class="phd-decor phd-pot" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">

    <h2>What’s cooking?</h2>

    <ul>
      <li>
        August 2026: I will be attending
        <a href="https://2026.esslli.eu/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">ESSLLI 2026</a>.
      </li>
      <li>
        July 2026: I presented a poster at
        <a href="https://coria-taln-2026.ls2n.fr/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">TALN 2026</a>.
      </li>
    </ul>
  </section>

</div>
